lines.text: No coin no boat. Tickets here, mind the gangway.

Welcome to Emberrock. The pub is open.

There's been strange tides lately, traveler.
Heard of the old ruins on the far shore?
Try the inn before you head inland.

Where to, sailor? Tickets are non-refundable.
Welcome, traveler. The dead grow restless lately.
Welcome to the bank. Deposits, withdrawals, and lock boxes.
What would you like to do?
Spells for sale, traveler. Pick a school.
The Cottage is for sale at 200 gold. Buy it?
The House is for sale at 800 gold. Buy it?
The Estate is for sale at 2000 gold. Buy it?
Sir/Madam, I can fetch goods from the shops at a discount.
The Manor is for sale at 6000 gold. Buy it?
Looking for a place to call home? I have four to show you.
You stand before a warm stove. What will you cook?
An empty garden plot. What will you plant?
Steel for steel - and ingots for forging.
Plate, mail, leather, plus shield blanks and ring stock.
Cloth, thread, and patterns for the sewing machine.
Adventurer! There are tasks aplenty. Twelve of them, in fact.
Knowledge is the only inheritance worth having. Which craft?
Five disciplines I can teach. Pick one.
Bring me a sewn or forged item and I'll bind a spell to it.
Pick a spell. The bound item gains its power on equip.
The sewing machine hums. Which pattern will you stitch?
The forge glows. What will you hammer out today?
Bring me the master ignition rune and I'll wake the line.
You stand atop the Spire. Three legendary items await.
Hot stew, soft beds, fair prices.
Welcome to the docks. All boats need a stamped ticket.
